dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates absolute adherence to the governance framework. All four reasoning spans (rules-context-loader, architecture-work-to-evolution-map, alignment-engine, and architecture-intent-generator) concluded with a 'schema_validation_success' event, ensuring that the output structures remained within the defined architectural constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' span shows exceptional reasoning depth with 65,009 completion tokens. This represents a slight increase over the baseline density, indicating an exhaustive mapping of work items to system evolution and a highly granular causal chain for the proposed architectural changes.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The 'alignment-engine' span was successfully executed, confirming that architectural tensions were analyzed. While the completion token count (2,901) is lower than the baseline's tension resolution volume, the successful schema validation and subsequent intent generation suggest that trade-offs were resolved effectively.
